name: section-tabs
description: Sub-navigation tabs for grouped pages (e.g. /videos shares tabs for All / Clips / TikTok). One <SectionTabs /> component + a small TS module to declare tab sets.
postInstall: 1. Edit lib/sectionTabs.ts to declare your tab sets
2. <SectionTabs tabs={videoTabs} /> at the top of each page in the group
